sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_lists (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, values LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT id, list_extract(values, 2)! AS extracted_factorial FROM test_lists WHERE list_extract(values, 2) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, list_extract(a.values, 4)! AS factorial_value FROM test_lists a JOIN test_lists b ON list_extract(a.values, 3) = list_extract(b.values, 1) ORDER BY factorial_value DESC;
SELECT id, (SELECT MAX(list_extract(values, 1)!) FROM test_lists WHERE list_extract(values, 1) IS NOT NULL) AS max_factorial FROM test_lists GROUP BY id HAVING max_factorial > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_values (num INT, val STRING);
SELECT t.num, list_extract(t.val, 1)! AS extracted_factorial FROM test_values t WHERE t.val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT list_extract(a.values, 1) FROM test_lists a WHERE a.id = 1)! AS inner_factorial FROM test_lists WHERE id = 2;
SELECT DISTINCT num, (list_extract(values, 1) || '!'::STRING)::INTEGER AS factorial_combined FROM test_lists WHERE list_extract(values, 1) IS NOT NULL;
